topic: Pia Cayetano defending Alan amid SEA Games corruption probe while claiming Senate legal expertise
tweet1: Senator Pia Cayetano defended her brother Alan as the NBI announced it will investigate the 2019 SEA Games anomaly—then hours later listed herself among the few lawyers keeping the impeachment court's integrity intact.
tweet2: @TheSitRepPH caught Alan Cayetano mocking the NBI probe: "You want to investigate bakit ako nagpatubo ng balbas?" Pia said she "didn't have enough time to research" but defended him anyway. That's not legal rigor—that's family loyalty.
tweet3: @rapplerdotcom fact-checked her list of Senate lawyers. She included Imee Marcos—who isn't a lawyer. If you're claiming legal expertise to anchor the impeachment court's credibility, maybe get the basics right first.
tweet4: Pia's framing integrity as a credential while defending Alan without research shows how institutional legitimacy gets weaponized. When senator-judges prioritize family defense over fact-finding, the trial becomes theater. Will any other senator call this out?
